prBodyNotes: :warning: MAJOR VERSION UPDATE :warning: - please manually update this package

packageRules.description: Groups together all dependencies on third party tools
Groups together all dependencies of the otel-compgen utility

OCB requires every component compiled into the distribution, plus the mdatagen/builder tools used to generate and assemble it, to share a compatible core collector version. All go.opentelemetry.io/collector*, opentelemetry-collector-contrib/*, and go.opentelemetry.io/otel* deps (across manifest.yaml, every component go.mod, and internal/tools/go.mod's mdatagen/builder) must move in lockstep, not one-at-a-time. The go.opentelemetry.io/otel and go.opentelemetry.io/otel/** API/SDK modules are direct dependencies of the custom receivers and are pinned to a version compatible with the collector core they compile into via OCB; letting them drift one-at-a-time reintroduces exactly the version skew this group prevents (Open Question #5, resolved: include them). Placed last so it overrides the generic 'tool deps' grouping for mdatagen/builder specifically. See .claude/skills/renovate-otel-core/SKILL.md for the full rationale.
